violations.text: A handwash aid was observed above the 3-bay sink. Handwash aid to be removed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
The hot water handle for the hand sink was observed in poor repair. Handle to be fixed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
The wall next to the grill area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Hole to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
